productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Stripes Green  Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Green and blue striped polo neck T-shirt with mustard accents, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, appliqued branding on the left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The classic stripe design on the front is always in vogue, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with straight Fit denims, a tonal jacket and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
